reason: Native menu, window geometry, persistence, and lifecycle ownership contracts.
Required Rust verification and geometry/persistence test conventions.
Fixed 168x30 renderer and bounded taskbar typography constraints.
Frontend checks, fixed CSS tracks, DPI, and accessibility requirements.
SettingsView stays presentational and icon-only commands keep semantic action, tooltip, and focus contracts.
Keep preset wire values typed while native coordinates and persistence remain Rust-owned.
Reuse the existing anchor and JSON persistence patterns instead of duplicating them.
